qa_pairs.question: How do you initiate a file transfer using Globus after selecting the desired files or directories?
qa_pairs.answer: Once you have highlighted the files or directories you wish to transfer, click on one of the large blue buttons with white arrowheads to initiate the transfer process.

qa_pairs.question: How are users informed when a Globus file transfer job has been completed?
qa_pairs.answer: Users will receive an email notification when their file transfer is complete.

qa_pairs.question: Where can users monitor the progress of their active file transfers and review details of completed transfers within the Globus interface?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can monitor in-progress transfers and view details of completed transfers by clicking on the "Activity" button located on the left side of the Globus interface.
